textByHash.0ff635d85be9b3101807beb00b9b8f6fd8615258: It's good that you should ask. I have information on the last scorpion for you.
textByHash.125190d4c7b0fbe699950b838e65d624ab4e7d0f: It seems to be in some sort of upstairs room. There seems to be some sort of brown clothing lying on a table.
textByHash.1780884522cdd053fc85c8c6e96e6f10ed462686: In a magic shop? Magical items, oddly enough.
textByHash.20cf9aaa755528578b4c2a4074619c37f0ba20ae: You see, that creature up there has a powerful divine energy about it. That energy is used to protect itself and interfere with our own divine capabilities.
textByHash.33c5a5d1d6b1dc4f08ddf915fd2f0936806ef2e0: Keep praying to charge the pillars!
textByHash.37188f360b6291f974f33821318cdc5be5f85f3d: Well you have come to the right place. I am a master of animal detection.
textByHash.3a733ec73a3e8f5efb256a2eaba753dde102fd50: Block its attacks with your prayers!
textByHash.3eee0c5e65eba5b2caf604aba5586d337ae112c5: You can't trade in zero of an item.
textByHash.415a6f2965e104e9b8a2266ca44f63054a3266a9: Enough questions. Leave me to browse in peace.
textByHash.436008d4aeb978350c1b2cf73f5bae3a3a25b47b: Let's convince that beastie to move!
textByHash.4ad2e60c0ead14d34cd83ab9222e5396734f93bc: I can see a scorpion that you seek. It would appear to be near some nasty spiders. I can see two coffins there as well.
textByHash.4bbb59b4d120f768f0c85a0097294ff4b08e7cec: Praying? Yes. To the gods? That is open to interpretation.
textByHash.4d4cc01087909f27d284e28d76791e0314ab686a: Knowledge comes from experience, power comes from battleaxes.
textByHash.52ff02594cb963c87e5c2e52c9d3847b4384e97c: It's shielded itself! You need to break its concentration!
textByHash.6a6387a1ef62e10ae6d65956c48c7a8673054c66: Keep praying to bolster your strength!
textByHash.78ed4d105cc7a2101e96a58d5b75d210a1b7e326: Anyway, the point is that without experienced seers to aid you, you may find yourself unable to utilise your prayers as you normally would.
textByHash.8a0eb6cfb7cba01115fe6cb3b366b601c0072203: The scorpion seems to be going through some crack in the wall. It's gone into some sort of secret room.
textByHash.8f1387b26e68e64a467563bdfc2be979820696d3: Well done! The power of the pillars is yours!
textByHash.971cda4057158010a6ac1ae174aee91440bf7cb1: I do not have the time nor desire to explain the advanced concepts of theology to you, but you should know that the Dwarves of Cam Torum take a different approach to worship than your kind.
textByHash.9b0c4bbba8681f3d49ab03521c9aa453325faf20: On the contrary, it would not be safe if we were not up here!
textByHash.9b500fc62afec76093e1b2b455c04605776c8afb: Indeed, just follow our lead and you'll be fine... probably.
textByHash.a123062955467f9927b035f8a15d060fe4c95a1e: Good. If you have any further questions about your role here, speak to Taala.
textByHash.a91c88fdf8790904edc7849b88aadc88105161f1: Excellent! The pillars are boosting your strength!
textByHash.aeb50d5f4c319a18b304b9a0dfeeb95680439d2e: Well, I've checked my looking glass. There seems to be a kharid scorpion in a little village in the east, surrounded by lots of uncivilised-looking warriors. Some kind of merchant there seems to have picked it up.
textByHash.b2779d474623cba62d17dd8aeafc4fc8bc1e77b2: Well see if you can find that scorpion then, and I'll try and get you some information on the others.
textByHash.de341ec65182738f17f135a9a43249bb51a5f34b: We need to charge all of the pillars using our prayers!
textByHash.df17f877f0389bebe18a90ed94faa71aefb40e66: Go for the tail! It's a weakspot!
textByHash.e6a33fe315458024834c50b968b68d3248e1ae44: Do you need to locate any particular scorpion? Scorpions are a creature somewhat in abundance.
textByHash.f101cc9678492c675fff10f642de025d6ae57e59: Remember, whenever you set out to do something, something else must be done first.
textByHash.f6f7f3f2637722bb5c3dff8e976deeb7d839abb7: Well done! Now, let's weaken it a little more!
textByHash.f8950b18049515797bd7a1067a7e2c1a984112a2: Let me look into my looking glass.
textByHash.fb450249a21e3a36f6f6822b22bbb3a856efa732: That's all I can tell you about that scorpion.
